name: neuroverse-governance
description: Enforce governance rules on AI agent actions. Turn plans into enforceable constraints. Deterministic evaluation — no LLM in the loop.

plan_enforcement.description: Compile a plan into enforceable rules. Block actions outside the plan. Track progress.
plan_enforcement.output: ON_PLAN / OFF_PLAN / CONSTRAINT_VIOLATED / PLAN_COMPLETE verdict with evidence

world_governance.description: Full governance engine with invariants, guards, roles, kernel rules, and audit trails.
world_governance.output: ALLOW / BLOCK / PAUSE verdict with trace

plan_derive.description: Generate a full governance world from a plan markdown file.
